title: Pasabahce Set of 3 White Wine Glasses Ivory Clear Glass 33.5cl Elegant, Strong and Dishwasher Safe
features: PASABAHCE: Quality and tradition for sophisticated wine glasses.
ELEGANCE AND FUNCTIONALITY: Clear glass that enhances the tasting of white wine.
Optimal capacity: 33.5 cl, perfect for any aromatic nuance.
DAILY PRACTICALITY Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.
description: Pack of 3 Pasabahce Ivory stemware made from high quality clear glass with a capacity of 33.5 ml each. Designed for tasting white wine, these glasses offer an elegant and functional design suitable for both everyday use and special occasions. Key features: Capacity 33.5 cl ideal for enhancing fresh and aromatic white wines Clear, thin but durable glass for optimal visual effect. Refined design, suitable for modern and traditional styles. Dishwasher safe for added convenience. Perfect for home, events or professional catering. A balanced choice between aesthetics and functionality for anyone who likes to serve wine in style.
